props.name: type
props.description: Sets the type of the input field.

props.name: name
props.description: Name of input value that is received in the onChange event.

props.name: value
props.description: Bound to value.

props.name: autoCapitalize
props.description: Controls whether and how text input is automatically capitalized as it is entered/edited by the user. This only works on mobile devices.

props.name: autoComplete
props.description: Specifies the autocomplete attribute for the input field.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Text displayed within the input when no value is set.

props.name: leadingIcon
props.description: Icon shown to the left of the text.

props.name: trailingIcon
props.description: Icon shown to the right of the text.

props.name: variant
props.description: Sets the visual style variant. 'goa' for standard GoA styling, 'bare' for minimal styling.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables this input. The input will not receive focus or events. Use [attr.disabled] with [formControl].

props.name: handleTrailingIconClick
props.description: Flag that will result in an icon button component being rendered instead of an icon.

props.name: focused
props.description: Sets the cursor focus to the input.

props.name: readOnly
props.description: Makes the input readonly.

props.name: error
props.description: Sets the input to an error state.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets the width of the text input area.

props.name: ariaLabel
props.description: Defines how the input will be translated for the screen reader. If not specified it will fall back to the name.

props.name: ariaLabelledBy
props.description: The aria-labelledby attribute identifies the element (or elements) that labels the input.

props.name: min
props.description: A string value that supports any number, or an ISO 8601 format if using the date or datetime type.

props.name: max
props.description: A string value that supports any number, or an ISO 8601 format if using the date or datetime type.

props.name: step
props.description: How much a number or date should change by.

props.name: prefix
props.description: @deprecated Use leadingContent slot instead.

props.name: suffix
props.description: @deprecated Use trailingContent slot instead.

props.name: debounce
props.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds before firing the change event. 0 means no debounce.

props.name: maxLength
props.description: Defines the maximum number of characters (as UTF-16 code units) the user can enter into the input.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the input element. Used for label associations and accessibility.

props.name: mt
props.description: Top margin.

props.name: mr
props.description: Right margin.

props.name: mb
props.description: Bottom margin.

props.name: ml
props.description: Left margin.

props.name: trailingIconAriaLabel
props.description: Aria label for the trailing icon. Use only when the trailing icon is interactive.

props.name: textAlign
props.description: Sets the text alignment within the input field.

props.name: size
props.description: Sets the size of the input. 'compact' reduces height for dense layouts.
